name: Cyber City
description: Gurgaon's primary IT and corporate district housing Fortune 500 offices. Home to companies like Google, Microsoft, Accenture, and Deloitte.

name: Udyog Vihar
description: Major industrial and commercial area in Sectors 18-20. Houses manufacturing units, IT parks, and corporate offices.

name: Golf Course Road
description: Premium corporate corridor with MNC headquarters, consulates, and luxury commercial complexes.

name: Millennium City Centre Metro
description: Key metro interchange point (formerly Huda City Centre) connecting Gurgaon to Delhi via the Yellow Line.

name: Medanta Hospital
description: One of India's largest multi-specialty hospitals. Employing 5,000+ healthcare professionals, it drives residential demand in Sector 38.

name: Artemis Hospital
description: Leading 400-bed multi-specialty hospital in Sector 51. Drives rental demand from medical professionals and patients' families.

name: Sectors 55-56 Rapid Metro
description: Rapid Metro station serving the residential hub of Sectors 55-56 with direct connectivity to Cyber City.

name: DLF Cyber Park
description: Premium IT park in DLF Phase 3, home to technology companies and startups.

name: Ambience Mall
description: One of NCR's largest malls on NH-8. Attracts weekend shoppers and drives rental demand in surrounding sectors.

name: Hero Honda Chowk / NH-8
description: Major NH-8 junction connecting Gurgaon to Delhi and the airport. Rapid Metro station nearby.
